{{Quote|Blasters charged!|Gunship Fighter pilot|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
The '''gunship fighter''' was the direct predecessor of the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAAT/i]] and [[advanced gunship fighter]]. It was used in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Clone Army]].

==Characteristics==
The gunship fighter was most effective at destroying enemy starfighters as well as ground units. The fighters were armed with a single [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] and were used in space or in atmospheric conditions.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
